error.no_voice: ❌ You are not in a voice channel.
error.no_voice_connected: ❌ Not connected to a voice channel.
error.stream_busy: ❌ Stream could not be started (voice client still busy).
error.stream_connect_error: ❌ Failed to connect to the stream.
error.invalid_format: ❌ Invalid format. Available options: mp3, webm
error.autoplay_radio: 📻 Autoplay is not available in radio mode.
error.now_usage: ❓ Usage: `!now <search term or URL>` — plays immediately
error.search_timeout: ❌ Search timed out. Please try again.
error.processing_timeout: ❌ Request timed out. Please check the URL and try again.
error.url_error: ❌ Failed to fetch information. Please check the URL.
error.station_name_not_found: ❌ Station `{name}` not found. `!radio` shows the list.
error.next_no_playlist: ⚠️ Playlists are not supported by `!next`. Please provide a single URL.
error.no_song_playing: ⚠️ No song is playing right now.
error.invalid_index: ❌ Invalid index. Please enter a valid number.
error.invalid_index_range: ❌ Invalid index. Please enter a number between 1 and {count}.
error.song_not_found_in_queue: ❌ No song with **{term}** found in the queue.
error.seek_radio: ❌ Seek is not available in radio mode.
error.nothing_to_save: ⚠️ Nothing to save — queue and current track are empty.
error.join_failed_code:
❌ Failed to connect to {channel} (Code: {code}).
⚠️ Possible causes:- Server settings: 'Bots can see voice channels' must be enabled- Voice channel permissions: Bot role must have Connect + Speak
error.move_failed:
❌ Failed to move to {channel}: {err}
⚠️ Check server permissions (bot role)
error.bot_not_in_voice: 🙅 The bot is not in a voice channel.
status.playlist_detected: 📃 Playlist detected: **{title}** – {count} entries found. Adding to queue...
status.duplicate_warning: ⚠️ **{title}** is already in the queue (position {pos}). Added anyway.
status.skipped: ⏭️ Song skipped. Playing the next track...
status.cleared: 🧹 The queue has been cleared and playback stopped.
status.queue_loaded: 📂 **{name}** loaded — {count} tracks added to the queue.
status.eq_restart: — Song will restart with the new EQ.
radio.stream_interrupted: 📻 Stream connection permanently lost. Radio stopped.
misc.auto_leave: 👋 Everyone's gone — I'll head out too. See you next time!
help.text:
🎵 Music
  !p <url/search>   – Play a song, playlist or search term
  !next <url/search>   – Play next
  !baba            – Play Baba playlist
  !s               – Skip current song
  !stop            – Stop playback (queue is kept)
  !x               – Pause
  !resume          – Resume playback
  !now <search/url/n> – Play immediately (also queue position n)
  !seek <time>     – Jump to position (!seek 1:23 or !seek 83)
  !loop            – Loop mode: off → song → queue → off
  !replay          – Replay last song
  !text            – Show lyrics of the current song

📜 Queue
  !q               – Show queue
  !shuffle         – Shuffle queue
  !clear           – Clear queue & stop playback
  !remove <n>      – Remove song at position n
  !move <n|title>  – Move song to front (by position or title search)
  !saveq <name>    – Save current queue under a name
  !loadq <name>    – Load a saved queue & append it
  !lists           – Show all saved queues
  !score           – Top 10 most played songs

🎚️ Audio
  !eq <preset>     – Set EQ preset (no argument: list)
                     Presets: bassboost, flat, vocalboost, superbass,
                              punchy, nightcore, karaoke, 8d
                     EQ change restarts the current song.
  !format <type>   – Switch audio format: mp3 or webm

🔁 Autoplay
  Autoplay button   – Automatically plays a related track after each song.
                     Press the button again to stop.

📻 Radio
  !radio            – Show station list
  !radio <nr/name>  – Play station
  !radio <URL> [name] – Play & save stream
  !radio delete <nr/name> – Delete station
  !radio rename <nr/name> <new name> – Rename station

🔊 Voice
  !j               – Join voice channel
  !l               – Leave voice channel

  !stats           – RAM, CPU, uptime and cache info
  !reloadcookies   – Reload cookies.txt (after manual upload to server)
  !restart         – Restart bot in new terminal (owner only)
  !help / !        – This overview
